zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Tilley於1490年出生在英國貝德福爾亨洛福時，他的父親Henry Tilley26歲，母親Johan Smallacombe23歲。他於1509年與Margaret Cunliffe在英國英格蘭貝德福爾亨洛福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾亨洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Tilley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tilly-sur-Seulles (Calvados) or Tilly (Eure), France.

English: habitational name from Tyley in Wotton under Edge (Gloucestershire), Tiley in Minterne Magna (Dorset), or Tilley (Shropshire). The Gloucestershire and Dorset placenames derive from Old English tigel ‘tile’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Shropshire placename derives from an uncertain first element + Old English lēah.
English: occupational name from Middle English tilie ‘one who tills the land, a husbandman’. Compare Tiller .

variants.name: Tillie
meanings: English (northern England and southern Scotland): variant of   Tilley  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tiller
meanings: English (southern, especially Hampshire): occupational name from Middle English tiliere, tilyer ‘one who tills the soil, husbandman, farmer, farm laborer’. This is a derivative of Old English tilian ‘to till (the soil)’, Middle English tilie. There has been some confusion of this name with Tyler .

variants.name: Tiley
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Somerset and Wiltshire): variant of   Tilley  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Tilley was born in 1490, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Henry Tilley, was 26 and his mother, Johan Smallacombe, was 23. He married Margaret Cunliffe in 1509, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1556, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Tilley est né en 1490, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Tilley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Johan Smallacombe, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Cunliffe en 1509, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1556, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Tilley 1490 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Tilley 26 und seine Mutter Johan Smallacombe 23. Er hat 1509 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Cunliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1556 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Tilley(이)가 1490년 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Tilley(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Johan Smallacombe(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 Margaret Cunliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Tilley родился в 1490 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Tilley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Johan Smallacombe, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Cunliffe в 1509 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1556 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия.
